name: herder
description: Create plans from user intent or repository evidence, validate and safely repair them, manage dependencies, and execute with reviewed integration and token accounting.

interface.shortDescription: Clarify, create, and execute plans with specialized agents.
interface.longDescription: Herder grills requested changes into canonical plans, audits repositories for evidence-backed improvements, validates and conservatively repairs local dependency-aware backlogs, reviews candidates, rescues failures, integrates verified work transactionally, and records per-attempt token usage with honest coverage.
defaultPrompt: Grill me one decision at a time, then create one validated Herder plan for this change.
Audit this repository and create prioritized Herder plans.
Validate and safely repair the Herder plan backlog.
Fire the implementation plans in this repository.
